design_plan: rng=42; AIDA checked; hero max-width math ~1120px for 2–3 lines; bento density via grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep confirms all competitors mentioned; button contrast validated on #0a0a0a vs #ffffff.
headline: Super vs Siri

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Siri. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Siri

summary: A fair, editorial comparison for people evaluating Apple’s next‑generation Siri against Super. Siri is becoming smarter inside Apple’s ecosystem, but Super is built for repeated computer‑use workflows—operating real computers and reusing a computer-use cache to lower cost and friction over time.
